title: Greece Approves First Hydrogen Law to Launch National Market and Align with EU Certification Regime
content: Greece has taken a pivotal step toward establishing a full-fledged domestic hydrogen economy, passing its first dedicated hydrogen lawâ€”Law 5251/2025â€”earlier this month. The legislation sets up a comprehensive framework for licensing, certifying, and financially supporting green hydrogen production in line with the European Unionâ€™s Renewable Fuels of Non-Biological Origin (RFNBO) rules.
author: Analysts Account
